Body.Content:
When replying to an email conversation and the message being replied to is not the latest in the conversation, Outlook for Windows and web will now display a notification indicating this. With this change, users can now be more confident that they are responding to the right message in an email conversation. #newoutlookforwindows

GA date: August CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Notification when not responding to most recent message of email thread
